mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM click_logs WHERE link_id = #{linkId}
SELECT COALESCE(device_type, 'UNKNOWN') as name, COUNT(*) as value FROM click_logs WHERE link_id = #{linkId} GROUP BY device_type
SELECT COALESCE(os_type, 'UNKNOWN') as name, COUNT(*) as value FROM click_logs WHERE link_id = #{linkId} GROUP BY os_type
SELECT COALESCE(referrer, 'DIRECT') as name, COUNT(*) as value FROM click_logs WHERE link_id = #{linkId} GROUP BY referrer

SELECT SUBSTR(timestamp, 1, 10) as date, COUNT(*) as clicks, SUM(CASE WHEN is_ad_clicked = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as adClicks, SUM(CASE WHEN is_converted = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as conversions FROM click_logs WHERE link_id = #{linkId} GROUP BY SUBSTR(timestamp, 1, 10) ORDER BY date ASC LIMIT 30

SELECT TO_CHAR(timestamp, 'YYYY-MM-DD') as date, COUNT(*) as clicks, SUM(CASE WHEN is_ad_clicked = true THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as adClicks, SUM(CASE WHEN is_converted = true THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as conversions FROM click_logs WHERE link_id = #{linkId} GROUP BY TO_CHAR(timestamp, 'YYYY-MM-DD') ORDER BY date ASC LIMIT 30
